controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of these directions either at the time of renewal or by april 10, 2026, whichever is earlier
controls.control_description:
Provided that a bank's existing Information Technology (IT) outsourcing
agreements regardless of whether they are due for renewal on or after the
effective date of these Directions shall comply with the provisions of these
Directions either at the time of renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of these directions either at the time of renewal or by april 10, 2026, whichever is earlier

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of these directions from the date of agreement itself
controls.control_description:
However, the bank's new IT outsourcing agreements that come into force on or
after the effective date of these Directions, shall comply with the provisions of
these Directions from the date of agreement itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of these directions from the date of agreement itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed as permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements
controls.control_description:
Provided further that nothing in the preceding proviso shall be construed as
permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory
requirements applicable to such arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed as permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to a bank's material outsourcing of it services, as defined in paragraph 6(3) of these directions
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to a bank's material outsourcing of IT services, as
defined in paragraph 6(3) of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to a bank's material outsourcing of it services, as defined in paragraph 6(3) of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure include outsourcing of the following services:
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'Outsourcing of IT
Services' shall include outsourcing of the following services:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include outsourcing of the following services:

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the following services:
controls.control_description: These Directions shall not apply to the following services:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the following services:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as res - commercial banks
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as res - commercial banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure banking companies (other than small finance banks, local area banks, payments banks and regional rural banks), corresponding new banks, and the state
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' means banking
companies (other than Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, Payments
Banks and Regional Rural Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State
Bank of India as defined respectively under clauses (c), (da), and (nc) of
section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to banking companies (other than small finance banks, local area banks, payments banks and regional rural banks), corresponding new banks, and the state

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'group' shall be as defined in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - concentration risk manageme
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Group' shall be as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025, as amended
from time to time, for the purpose of intragroup transactions and
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'group' shall be as defined in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - concentration risk manageme

controls.control_objective: To ensure it services / it enabled services / it activities
controls.control_description: (2) 'IT services' means IT services / IT enabled services / IT activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to it services / it enabled services / it activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the potential to significantly impact the bank's business operations
controls.control_description:
(i) if disrupted or compromised shall have the potential to significantly
impact the bank's business operations;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the potential to significantly impact the bank's business operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure have material impact on the bank's customers in the event of any unauthorised access, loss or theft of customer information
controls.control_description:
(ii) may have material impact on the bank's customers in the event of
any unauthorised access, loss or theft of customer information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have material impact on the bank's customers in the event of any unauthorised access, loss or theft of customer information

controls.control_objective: To ensure use of a third party (either an affiliated entity within a corporate group or an entity that is external to the corporate group) by a bank to perform
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Outsourcing' means use of a third party (either an affiliated entity within a
corporate group or an entity that is external to the corporate group) by a
bank to perform activities on a continuing basis that would normally be
undertaken by the bank itself, now or in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use of a third party (either an affiliated entity within a corporate group or an entity that is external to the corporate group) by a bank to perform

controls.control_objective: To ensure include agreements for a limited period
controls.control_description:
'Continuing basis' shall
include agreements for a limited period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include agreements for a limited period

controls.control_objective: To ensure provider of it services including entities related to the bank or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which the bank belongs
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Service Provider' means provider of IT services including entities related
to the bank or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to
which the bank belongs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provider of it services including entities related to the bank or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which the bank belongs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as 'service providers' defined above:
controls.control_description:
Provided that for the purpose of these Directions, the following indicative
(but not exhaustive) list of vendors and entities shall not be considered as
'Service Providers' defined above:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as 'service providers' defined above:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the information
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 or the Information Technology Act, 2000, or the
Companies Act, 2013, and Rules made thereunder, or any statutory modification
or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI, or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the information

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board-approved it outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 15
controls.control_description:
A bank intending to outsource its IT services shall put in place a comprehensive
Board-approved IT outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in
paragraph 15.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board-approved it outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 15

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible, inter alia, for:
controls.control_description: The Board shall be responsible, inter alia, for:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible, inter alia, for:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be owned or controlled by any director, key managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their relatives as indicated under the p
controls.control_description:
(iv) ensuring either by itself or through its Committee, that there is no conflict of
interest arising out of third-party engagements, especially when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services,
if not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, key
managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their
relatives as indicated under the proviso to paragraph 12(vi) of these
Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned or controlled by any director, key managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their relatives as indicated under the p

controls.control_objective: To ensure diminish its obligations, and those of its board and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced service
controls.control_description:
As stated in paragraph 8, the outsourcing of any IT service by a bank shall not
diminish its obligations, and those of its Board and Senior Management, who have
the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to diminish its obligations, and those of its board and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced service

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage a service provider that would result in its reputation being compromised or weakened
controls.control_description:
(ii) it shall not engage a service provider that would result in its reputation being
compromised or weakened;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage a service provider that would result in its reputation being compromised or weakened

controls.control_objective: To ensure neither impede nor interfere with the ability of the bank to effectively oversee and manage its services
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to neither impede nor interfere with the ability of the bank to effectively oversee and manage its services

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned under the companies act, 2013, and the rules framed thereunder from time to time
controls.control_description:
The terms 'control', 'director', 'key
managerial personnel', and 'relative' shall have the same meaning as
assigned under the Companies Act, 2013, and the Rules framed thereunder
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned under the companies act, 2013, and the rules framed thereunder from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure an exception to the above requirement may be made with the approval of board or a committee of the board, followed by appropriate disclosure, oversigh
controls.control_description:
Provided that an exception to the above requirement may be made with the
approval of Board or a Committee of the Board, followed by appropriate
disclosure, oversight, and monitoring of such arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an exception to the above requirement may be made with the approval of board or a committee of the board, followed by appropriate disclosure, oversigh

controls.control_objective: To ensure evaluate the need for outsourcing of it services based on a comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks and availability of commensurate pro
controls.control_description:
A bank shall evaluate the need for outsourcing of IT services based on a
comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks and availability of
commensurate processes to manage those risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evaluate the need for outsourcing of it services based on a comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks and availability of commensurate pro

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, consider the following:
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, the bank shall,
inter alia, consider the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, consider the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that cyber incidents are reported to it by the service provider without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the bank to the rbi wit
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that cyber incidents are reported to it by the service provider
without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the bank to the RBI within
six hours of detection by the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that cyber incidents are reported to it by the service provider without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the bank to the rbi wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board-approved it outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the following:
controls.control_description:
A bank intending to outsource any of its IT services shall put in place a
comprehensive Board-approved IT outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the
following:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board-approved it outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, be responsible for:
controls.control_description: The Senior Management of a bank shall, inter alia, be responsible for:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, be responsible for:

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, include:
controls.control_description: The responsibilities of the IT Function of a bank shall, inter alia, include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a risk management framework that comprehensively deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement, mitigatio
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place a risk management framework that comprehensively
deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement,
mitigation, management, and reporting of risks associated with such IT
outsourcing arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a risk management framework that comprehensively deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement, mitigatio

controls.control_objective: To ensure suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in line with the roles and responsibilities of the board of directors, senior management
controls.control_description:
A bank shall suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in line
with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior Management,
and IT Function, and subject the same to internal and external quality assurance
on a periodic basis as determined by the Board-approved policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in line with the roles and responsibilities of the board of directors, senior management

controls.control_objective: To ensure effectively assess the impact of concentration risk posed by multiple outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider and the concentration risk
controls.control_description:
A bank shall effectively assess the impact of concentration risk posed by multiple
outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider and the concentration risk
<image>
posed by outsourcing critical or material functions to a limited number of service
providers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to effectively assess the impact of concentration risk posed by multiple outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider and the concentration risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for the confidentiality and integrity of data and information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be responsible for the confidentiality and integrity of data and
information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for the confidentiality and integrity of data and information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on 'need to know' basis, with appropriate controls to prevent security breaches, or data misuse
controls.control_description:
Access by service providers to data at the bank or its data centre shall be on 'need
to know' basis, with appropriate controls to prevent security breaches, or data
misuse.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on 'need to know' basis, with appropriate controls to prevent security breaches, or data misuse

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider
controls.control_description:
A bank shall seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the
customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on a 'need to know' basis
controls.control_description:
Access
to customer information by a service provider or its staff shall be on a 'need to
know' basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on a 'need to know' basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure take care to build adequate safeguards so that there is no combining of information, documents, records, and assets
controls.control_description:
In instances, where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
REs, the bank shall take care to build adequate safeguards so that there is no
combining of information, documents, records, and assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take care to build adequate safeguards so that there is no combining of information, documents, records, and assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be combined or comingled, it would suffice if there is clear separation and isolation of data (bank, and its customer specific data and information) t
controls.control_description:
Explanation: With regard to requirement that data should not be combined or
comingled, it would suffice if there is clear separation and isolation of data (bank,
and its customer specific data and information) to ensure that only the personnel
as authorised by the bank is able to access data that belongs to them in a multi-
tenant environment / architecture.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be combined or comingled, it would suffice if there is clear separation and isolation of data (bank, and its customer specific data and information) t

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo
controls.control_description:
A bank shall review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its
service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclose
security breaches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately notify rbi in the event of breach of security, and leakage of confidential customer-related information
controls.control_description:
A bank shall immediately notify RBI in the event of breach of security, and leakage
of confidential customer-related information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately notify rbi in the event of breach of security, and leakage of confidential customer-related information

controls.control_objective: To ensure <image> adhere to the extant instructions issued by rbi from time to time on incident response and recovery management
controls.control_description:
In these eventualities, the bank shall
<image>
adhere to the extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on Incident
Response and Recovery Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to <image> adhere to the extant instructions issued by rbi from time to time on incident response and recovery management

controls.control_objective: To ensure perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply
controls.control_description:
A bank shall perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an
outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to
comply with obligations in the outsourcing agreement on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve an evaluation of all available information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:
controls.control_description:
The due diligence mentioned above shall involve an evaluation of all available
information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to involve an evaluation of all available information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:

controls.control_objective: To ensure impact data security and service performance
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impact data security and service performance

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a risk-based approach in conducting such due diligence activities
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adopt a risk-based approach in conducting such due diligence
activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt a risk-based approach in conducting such due diligence activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain independent reviews and market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence
controls.control_description:
Where possible, a bank shall obtain independent reviews and market feedback on
the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain independent reviews and market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its rights and obligations and those of each service provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that its rights and obligations and those of each service
provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its rights and obligations and those of each service provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriately reckon the criticality of the outsourced task to the business of the bank, the associated risks, and the strategies for mitigating or ma
controls.control_description:
In
principle, the provisions of the agreement shall appropriately reckon the criticality
of the outsourced task to the business of the bank, the associated risks, and the
strategies for mitigating or managing them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriately reckon the criticality of the outsourced task to the business of the bank, the associated risks, and the strategies for mitigating or ma

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carefully defined and vetted by the bank's legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement shall be
carefully defined and vetted by the bank's legal counsel on their legal effect and
enforceability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carefully defined and vetted by the bank's legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow the bank to retain an adequate control over the outsourced service, and the right to i
controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible
to allow the bank to retain an adequate control over the outsourced service, and
the right to intervene with appropriate measures to meet legal and regulatory
<image>
obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow the bank to retain an adequate control over the outsourced service, and the right to i

controls.control_objective: To ensure also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties
controls.control_description:
The agreement shall also bring out the nature of legal relationship
between the parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure include (as applicable to the scope of these directions) the following aspects:
controls.control_description:
The agreement at a minimum shall include (as applicable to the scope of these
Directions) the following aspects:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include (as applicable to the scope of these directions) the following aspects:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced services
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced services

controls.control_objective: To ensure include (as applicable to the scope of these directions), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the systems and resources, serv
controls.control_description:
This shall include (as applicable to the scope of these
Directions), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the
systems and resources, service availability, adherence to SLA requirements, and
incident response mechanism.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include (as applicable to the scope of these directions), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the systems and resources, serv

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct regular audits (as applicable to the scope of these directions) of service providers (including sub-contractors) with regard to the service ou
controls.control_description:
A bank shall conduct regular audits (as applicable to the scope of these Directions)
of service providers (including sub-contractors) with regard to the service
outsourced by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct regular audits (as applicable to the scope of these directions) of service providers (including sub-contractors) with regard to the service ou

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted either by bank's internal auditors or external auditors appointed to act on bank's behalf
controls.control_description:
Such audits may be conducted either by bank's internal auditors
or external auditors appointed to act on bank's behalf.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted either by bank's internal auditors or external auditors appointed to act on bank's behalf

controls.control_objective: To ensure be availing services from the same service provider
controls.control_description:
While outsourcing various IT services, more than one RE may be availing services
from the same service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be availing services from the same service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt pooled <image> (shared) audit
controls.control_description:
In such scenarios, in lieu of conducting separate
audits by individual REs of the common service provider, they may adopt pooled
<image>
(shared) audit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt pooled <image> (shared) audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the responsibility of res in ensuring that the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the service provider are met effectivel
controls.control_description:
However, in doing so, it shall be the responsibility of REs in ensuring that
the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the service provider
are met effectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the responsibility of res in ensuring that the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the service provider are met effectivel

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, assess the performance of the service provider, adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and complianc
controls.control_description:
The audits shall, inter alia, assess the performance of the service provider,
adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and
compliance with laws and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, assess the performance of the service provider, adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and complianc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the bank from the outsourcing arrangements
controls.control_description:
The frequency of the audit shall be
determined based on the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the bank from
the outsourcing arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the bank from the outsourcing arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically by the senior management, and in case of any adverse development, the same shall be put up to the board for information
controls.control_description:
Reports on the monitoring and control activities
shall be reviewed periodically by the Senior Management, and in case of any
adverse development, the same shall be put up to the Board for information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically by the senior management, and in case of any adverse development, the same shall be put up to the board for information

controls.control_objective: To ensure also rely upon globally recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of conducting independent audits
controls.control_description:
A bank, depending upon the risk assessment, may also rely upon globally
recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu
of conducting independent audits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also rely upon globally recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of conducting independent audits

controls.control_objective: To ensure absolve the bank of its responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls, and procedures required to safeguard data security (including availabili
controls.control_description:
However, this shall not absolve the bank of its
responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls, and procedures required to
safeguard data security (including availability of systems) at the service provider's
end.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to absolve the bank of its responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls, and procedures required to safeguard data security (including availabili

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations
controls.control_description:
A bank shall periodically review the financial and operational condition of the
service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt risk-based approach in defining the periodicity
controls.control_description:
A bank
shall adopt risk-based approach in defining the periodicity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt risk-based approach in defining the periodicity

controls.control_objective: To ensure highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentiality and security, and operational resilience preparedness
controls.control_description:
Such due diligence
reviews shall highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards,
confidentiality and security, and operational resilience preparedness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentiality and security, and operational resilience preparedness

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective access to (a) data related to the outsourced services
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective
access to (a) data related to the outsourced services;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective access to (a) data related to the outsourced services

controls.control_objective: To ensure create an inventory of it services outsourced to service providers (including key entities involved in their supply chains)
controls.control_description:
A bank shall create an inventory of IT services outsourced to service providers
(including key entities involved in their supply chains).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to create an inventory of it services outsourced to service providers (including key entities involved in their supply chains)

controls.control_objective: To ensure map its dependency on third parties, and periodically evaluate the information received from the service providers
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall map
its dependency on third parties, and periodically evaluate the information received
from the service providers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to map its dependency on third parties, and periodically evaluate the information received from the service providers

controls.control_objective: To ensure require its service providers to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity plan (bcp), an
controls.control_description:
A bank shall require its service providers to develop and establish a robust
framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing Business Continuity Plan
(BCP), and Disaster Recovery Plan (DRP) commensurate with the nature, and
scope of the outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by RBI from time
to time on BCP / DR requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to require its service providers to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity plan (bcp), an

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the availability of alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced service back in-house in an emergency, and th
controls.control_description:
In establishing a viable contingency plan, a bank shall consider the availability of
alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced service
back in-house in an emergency, and the costs, time and resources that would be
involved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the availability of alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced service back in-house in an emergency, and th

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu
controls.control_description:
In order to mitigate the risk of unexpected termination of the outsourcing
agreement or insolvency or liquidation of its service provider, a bank shall retain
an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the
right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its business operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the bank's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions o
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the bank's
information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse
conditions or termination of the agreement, all documents, records of transactions,
and information given to the service provider, and assets of the bank, can be
removed from the possession of the service provider, or deleted, destroyed or
rendered unusable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the bank's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions o

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain a clear exit strategy with regard to outsourced it services, for ensuring business continuity during and after exit
controls.control_description:
The IT outsourcing policy shall contain a clear exit strategy with regard to
outsourced IT services, for ensuring business continuity during and after exit.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to contain a clear exit strategy with regard to outsourced it services, for ensuring business continuity during and after exit

controls.control_objective: To ensure include plans for different scenarios of exit, or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary
controls.control_description:
The strategy shall include plans for different scenarios of exit, or termination of
services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include plans for different scenarios of exit, or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, identify alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider or by the bank itself
controls.control_description:
In documenting its exit strategy, a bank shall, inter alia, identify alternative
arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service
provider or by the bank itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, identify alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider or by the bank itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure be legally obliged to co-operate fully with both the bank, and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition
controls.control_description:
A service provider shall be legally obliged to co-operate fully with both the bank,
and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be legally obliged to co-operate fully with both the bank, and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe
removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as
applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the service provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering or changing any data during the transition period
controls.control_description:
The outsourcing agreement shall ensure that the service provider is prohibited
from erasing, purging, revoking, altering or changing any data during the transition
period, unless specifically advised by the RBI or the concerned bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the service provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering or changing any data during the transition period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given due publicity by the bank so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider
controls.control_description:
In the event of termination of the outsourcing agreement for any reason in cases
where the service provider deals with the customers of the bank, the same shall be
given due publicity by the bank so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing
with the concerned service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given due publicity by the bank so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure such an arrangement is backed by the board-approved policy, and appropriate slas / agreements with its group entities are in place
controls.control_description:
A bank may outsource any IT service within its business group / conglomerate,
provided that such an arrangement is backed by the Board-approved policy, and
appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to such an arrangement is backed by the board-approved policy, and appropriate slas / agreements with its group entities are in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on objective reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the bank shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha
controls.control_description:
The selection of a group entity shall be based on objective reasons that are similar
to selection of a third-party, and the bank shall appropriately deal with any conflicts
of interest that such an outsourcing arrangement may entail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on objective reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the bank shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its group entities
controls.control_description:
A bank, at all times, shall maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its
group entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its group entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identical to those specified for a non-related party
controls.control_description:
Risk management practices being adopted by the bank while
<image>
outsourcing to a group entity shall be identical to those specified for a non-related
party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identical to those specified for a non-related party

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be entered into with parties operating in jurisdictions that generally uphold confidentiality clauses, and agreements
controls.control_description:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that generally uphold confidentiality clauses, and
agreements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be entered into with parties operating in jurisdictions that generally uphold confidentiality clauses, and agreements

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description: While engaging with service provider(s) in a foreign country, a bank shall:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the following requirements in the case of outsourcing of soc operations in addition to the controls prescribed in these directions: definition
controls.control_description:
Considering the risks associated with outsourcing of Security Operations Centre
(SOC) operations by a bank, such as data being stored and processed at an
external location and managed by the service provider (or its sub-contractors)to
which the bank has lesser visibility, the bank, to mitigate the risks, shall adopt the
following requirements in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations in addition to
the controls prescribed in these Directions:
definition, customisation, and related data / logs, meta-data, and analytics
(specific to the bank);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the following requirements in the case of outsourcing of soc operations in addition to the controls prescribed in these directions: definition

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to other applicable provisions in these directions:
controls.control_description:
Considering the varied services, benefits, and risk profiles associated with the
cloud deployment and service models, a bank that uses cloud services for storage,
computing and movement of data in cloud environments shall, in addition to other
applicable provisions in these Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to other applicable provisions in these directions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m
controls.control_description:
Such
assessment shall include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads
of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration,
consulting, migration, and projected recurring expenditure depending on the
nature of workloads.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk assessment
controls.control_description:
The extent of cloud adoption may vary, ranging from
migration of non-business critical workloads to the cloud, to deployment of
critical business applications such as SaaS, or other combinations in
between, and shall be determined based on a duly conducted business
technology risk assessment;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk assessment

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that specified procedures are consistent with business needs and legal and regulatory requirements
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that specified procedures are consistent with business needs and legal and regulatory requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to, inter alia, nist sp 800-210 general access control guidance for cloud systems https://nvlpubs
controls.control_description:
For cloud security best practices, a bank may refer to, inter alia, NIST SP
800-210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems
https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/NIST.SP.800-210.pdf
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to refer to, inter alia, nist sp 800-210 general access control guidance for cloud systems https://nvlpubs

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia
controls.control_description:
Such a policy shall, inter
alia,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into a contract only with csps that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements, and the rights available thereunder t
controls.control_description:
A bank shall enter into a contract only with CSPs
that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements, and
the rights available thereunder to the bank, including those relating to
aspects such as data storage, data protection, and confidentiality;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into a contract only with csps that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements, and the rights available thereunder t

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description: The technology architecture shall:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be a part of the service level stipulations in sla
controls.control_description:
(a) factor, inter alia, agreed processes and turnaround times for
returning the bank's service collaterals and data held by the CSP,
data completeness, and portability, secure purge of bank's
information from the CSP's environment, smooth transition of
services, and unambiguous definition of liabilities, damages,
penalties and indemnities, which should also be a part of the service
level stipulations in SLA;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be a part of the service level stipulations in sla

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have a robust grievance redressal mechanism that shall not be
compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i.e., responsibility for
<image>
redressal of customers' grievances related to outsourced services shall rest with
the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure affect the rights of its customers against the bank, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal as applicable under relevant laws
controls.control_description:
Outsourcing arrangements entered into by a bank shall not affect the rights of its
customers against the bank, including the ability of the customers to obtain
redressal as applicable under relevant laws.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to affect the rights of its customers against the bank, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal as applicable under relevant laws

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed
prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions, or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein, and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
